title: Research aims to fill critical gaps in telehealth design
summary_en: Farzane Omidi shares how the use of technology and environmental design impact the quality of care received through telehealth
title_cn: 研究致力于填补远程医疗设计领域关键空白

title: Helping Iowans adopt innovation
summary_en: Iowa State University Extension and Outreach connects Iowans with opportunities to innovate: youth get hands-on AI education, food entrepreneurs try a mobile processing cart and farmers examine livestock tech in the field.
title_cn: 2026年“在岗创新”系列活动助力艾奥瓦州民众应用创新成果
